faqs.question: What types of crickets are common in Teaneck, NJ?
faqs.answer: Teaneck properties commonly experience issues with house crickets, field crickets, and camel crickets. House crickets are attracted to warmth and often enter basements and crawl spaces, while field crickets invade from yards and gardens. Camel crickets prefer damp areas like basements and are frequently found in older Teaneck homes.
